2024-25 UC Riverside Highlanders Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 21-13 (14-6, 3rd in Big West MBB)

Coach: Mike Magpayo

PS/G: 74.8 (145th of 364)

PA/G: 75.0 (272nd of 364)

SRS: -1.47 (167th of 364)

SOS: 0.38 (128th of 364)

ORtg: 108.3 (154th of 364)

DRtg: 108.6 (286th of 364)
